case_title: RENE GALARZA VS. MARIA CECILE DELEON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-17-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RENE GALARZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA CECILE DELEON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IN FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,485.00 FILED BY GALARZA, RENE AS TO DEFENDANT DELEON, MARIA CECILE AKA PAULY DELEON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: CURRENT RESIDENT NOTIFIED THE SHERIFF'S CIVIL SECTION OFFICE AND SPOKE WITH CLERK (DAVE). CURRENT RESIDENT STATED THAT MARIA CECILE DE LEON NO LONGER LIVES AT ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALARZA, RENE AS TO DEFENDANT DELEON, MARIA CECILE AKA PAULY DELEON
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
